mapper.select: /* AdminMenuMapper.getMenuList */ SELECT CASE WHEN MENU_PID = '0' THEN '#' ELSE MENU_PID END AS parent ,MENU_ORDR AS menuOrder ,MENU_DEPTH AS menuDepth ,MENU_ID AS id ,MENU_NM AS text ,MENU_TYPE AS menuType ,MENU_URL AS menuUrl ,MENU_ICON AS menuIcon ,USE_YN AS useYn ,SITE_CODE AS siteCode FROM TB_MENU WHERE SITE_CODE = #{siteCode} ORDER BY MENU_ORDR ASC

/* AdminMenuMapper.selectMenuAuthList */ SELECT AUTH_GRP_CD AS authGrpCd ,MENU_ID AS menuId ,MENU_PID AS menuPid ,SITE_CODE AS siteCode FROM TB_MENU_AUTH WHERE MENU_ID = #{menuId} AND MENU_PID = #{menuPid} AND SITE_CODE = #{siteCode}
